title: Address run/create performance issues
body:
Fixed the logic where we observed different performance
results when running an image by its fqname vs a shortname. In
the case of the latter, we resolve the name without using the
network.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude looks like an issue with create container tests is popping.

:pushpin: Commit 5a1cc2c has been approved by `rhatdan`
